content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.65%, Bank Nifty -1.12%, VIX +3.19% to 17.15 — risk-off undertone but pockets of strong sector rotation (IT, FMCG post-results, Defence, Cables). Book is +1.32% on the day with multiple Q4-results-driven winners; priority is locking in gains via SL trails on extended names rather than chasing fresh breakouts at the highs.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24300
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1072.12,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "HOLD-equivalent. Position +10.4%, SL 1072.12 already locks in ~+9% gain (well above breakeven). CMP 1086.40, SL is 1.3% below CMP — within the 1% trail-gap floor margin. Thesis intact (Q4 PAT +19%, sub-1% GNPA). Keeping current SL/target — no MODIFY needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL 1072.12 already locked above breakeven (+9% gain protected); CMP 1086.40 sits 1.3% above SL — adequate trail gap. Target 1135 still ~4.5% away. Q4 thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Hedge position -0.7%. SL 121 is 2.6% below CMP 124.25 — adequate gap. Gold consolidating; macro hedge value intact with VIX rising."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "new_target": 845.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.9%, CMP 828.50. Move SL from 818 to 820 (entry/breakeven) — locks zero loss. Trail gap to CMP is 1.0% (at the floor). Q4 PAT +14%, FMCG recovery, record high — let it run to 845."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1338.68,
      "new_target": 1420.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +8.6% at CMP 1362.60. SL 1338.68 already 1.75% below CMP and locks +6.3% gain — trail-gap rule (≥1% below CMP) satisfied. No tighter trail without violating gap rule. Hold to target 1420."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL already trailed to 1338.68 protecting +6.3%. Trail gap 1.75% — within tolerance. Encora deal + AI deal momentum supports run to 1420."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.4% at 3067.10. SL 3030 is 1.2% below CMP — within trail-gap floor. Defence Q4 strong; corvette catalyst pending. Let target 3225 work."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "new_target": 875.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +4.3% at CMP 839.75. Current SL 825 already locks +2.4%; trail gap to CMP 1.76% — adequate. Tightening further would breach 1% floor. Keep stored values; HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL 825 already trailed above entry 806; +2.4% locked. Trail gap 1.76% within floor. All-time-high EBITDA margin Q4 supports run to 875."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat at -0.1%. SL 1445 is 2.9% below CMP — adequate. Q4 PAT +37%, EBITDA margin +280bps. Recent entry; let SL absorb chop."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.6% on entry day, CMP 1609.50, SL 1580 is 1.8% below — within tolerance. Q4 turnaround thesis intact. Faded off morning high but no thesis break."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat +0.1%. SL 2745 is 1.4% below CMP 2782.80 — within trail gap. Specialty chem leader, capex catalysts. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.2%, CMP 9117. SL 9020 is 1.06% below — at the trail-gap floor. Q4 record revenue, Rs 47 dividend, broker upgrades. Let setup work."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.6% at 2005. SL 1955 is 2.5% below — adequate. Q4 PAT -17.4% on exceptionals is a concern but defence momentum offsets. Let SL work."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.5% at 362.95. SL 354 is 2.5% below — adequate. Q4 PAT +30.6%, lending +32%. Faded with bank weakness today; thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.7% at 10713. SL 10440 is 2.5% below — adequate. Buyback at 12000 + Rs 150 dividend + Q4 PAT +34% strong catalyst stack. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 40,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 487.00,
      "stop_loss": 472.00,
      "target": 510.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +15.75%, India FMCG +9.5%, Quick Commerce +54%, Foods +30%. Final dividend Rs 5.50. CMP 487.50 broke through 20-DMA decisively on volume. SL 472 = -3.1% (risk Rs 600), Target 510 = +4.7% (reward Rs 920). R:R = 1.53. Position size: 40 × 487 = Rs 19,480 (~1.9% of capital), risk = 0.06% of portfolio — well within budget. FMCG diversification (existing exposure: MARICO only). No binary event in next 3 sessions (results already out)."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "INDUSINDBK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Rule 13 governance overhang — active SFIO criminal probe, SEBI insider-trading restraint on former officials, derivatives lapse. Prior Day-5 round-trip already burned a slot on this name. NO new entry until regulator closure."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "NUVAMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "+20% spike on undefined news catalyst — momentum-chasing into news without defined thesis or R:R clarity. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TATATECH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "12.8x volume with only +1.25% price move = institutional positioning unclear (could be either side). Without clear directional read, NO_ACTION."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "PERSISTENT",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Research flagged NEUTRAL with -0.05 modifier. 81% US revenue exposure to tariff overhang, Citi Sell at 4230 (~17% below CMP 5107), -27% from 52w high. Bearish dailies into May 5. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "FINCABLES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Cables-cluster cap — POLYCAB already held in capital goods/cables. Adding FINCABLES is correlated-theme stacking (Rule 10). Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "THERMAX",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "+14.5% to fresh 52w high in single session — chasing extended breakout. Capital goods cluster already represented (POLYCAB, GRSE). Skip per cluster discipline."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "GABRIEL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Auto-component cluster — already hold BHARATFORG and BAJAJ-AUTO in Auto. Cluster cap reached. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "APOLLOTYRE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Auto-component cluster — already hold BHARATFORG, BAJAJ-AUTO. Skip per Rule 10."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Pharma already represented (WOCKPHARMA). Adding second pharma momentum name on same day = cluster stacking. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "LUPIN",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Pharma cluster — WOCKPHARMA covers exposure. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "RAMCOCEM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Modest +4.89% breakout, no detailed Q4 surprise data in research. Pass — book is already 61% deployed; add bar is high."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "PNBHOUSING", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 1072.12 locks +9% gain; trail gap 1.3% adequate."},
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Hedge intact; SL 121 adequate."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 820.00, "reasoning": "Move SL to entry 820 (breakeven) at +0.9% gain; locks zero loss."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 1338.68 locks +6.3%; trail gap 1.75% within floor."},
    {"symbol": "GRSE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 3030 within 1.2% trail-gap floor; thesis intact."},
    {"symbol": "CAMS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 825 already above entry; +2.4% locked, trail gap 1.76%."},
    {"symbol": "PIDILITIND", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Flat; thesis (Q4 +37%) intact, SL 1445 absorbing chop."},
    {"symbol": "WOCKPHARMA", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Day-1 fade off high within SL absorption."},
    {"symbol": "SRF", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Flat; specialty chem catalysts pending."},
    {"symbol": "POLYCAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Q4 record + dividend; SL at trail-gap floor."},
    {"symbol": "BHARATFORG", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Defence offset to PAT decline; SL absorbing entry chop."},
    {"symbol": "ABCAPITAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +30%; banking-day weakness, thesis intact."},
    {"symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Buyback + dividend stack; SL 10440 adequate."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "HFCL pending OPEN BUY 600 @ 133.50 from earlier session — letting it work; not stacking duplicate. PERSISTENT (NEUTRAL -0.05 + Citi Sell + tariff exposure), INDUSINDBK (governance), THERMAX/FINCABLES/LAURUSLABS/LUPIN/GABRIEL/APOLLOTYRE/POLYCAB-extension all rejected on cluster discipline (Rule 10). DABUR admitted as the qualifying FMCG-cluster expansion (paired with MARICO, both Q4-driven, complementary distribution channels). Booking deployment up from 61% to ~63% — within soft target.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book composition: Financial Services (PNBHOUSING, CAMS, ABCAPITAL ~24%), IT (COFORGE), Capital Goods (GRSE, POLYCAB), Chemicals (SRF, PIDILITIND), Healthcare (WOCKPHARMA), Auto (BHARATFORG, BAJAJ-AUTO), FMCG (MARICO + DABUR), Hedge (GOLDBEES). Diversified. Day P&L +1.32%, cumulative +1.02% — first session above water in cumulative terms. Discipline: trailed MARICO to breakeven at +0.9%; resisted trailing other gainers tighter than 1% trail-gap floor (lesson from Day-10 BANDHANBNK/BAJFINANCE forced exits). DABUR add gives FMCG cluster 2 names — at cap. No further admits this session unless a new BULLISH signal at +0.10 modifier surfaces in afternoon batch."
}
